desc: A hulking, hyena-headed humanoid covered in crude hide armor. Its yellow eyes gleam with predatory hunger, and a jagged spear is clutched in one clawed hand.
A hulking, hyena-headed humanoid covered in crude hide armor. Its yellow eyes gleam with predatory hunger, and a shortbow is gripped in one clawed hand.
